title: Passengers from Spawn Eggs 2.0│刷怪蛋裡的乘客2.0
description: Makes the Passenger NBT work for entities in spawn eggs.│使 Passenger NBT標籤適用於刷怪蛋所生成的實體。
body:
# Introduce│介紹
This data pack fixes an issue where spawn eggs wouldn't spawn both a mob and its passengers. Now, by configuring the "Passengers" NBT data for the entity spawned by using a spawn egg, you can now spawn both a passenger and the mob.│該資料包修復了刷怪蛋無法讓生物與它的乘客一起生成的問題。現在，透過設定刷怪蛋使用後生成的實體的NBT資料```Passengers```即可讓刷怪蛋在使用後同時生成乘客。
## Take Spider Jockey as an example│以蜘蛛騎士為例

```
/give @s minecraft:spider_spawn_egg[minecraft:entity_data={id:"minecraft:spider",Passengers:[{id:"minecraft:skeleton",equipment:{mainhand:{id:"bow"}}}]}]
```
# About the original Passengers from Spawn Eggs│關於原本的刷怪蛋裡的乘客
This data pack is based on the functionality of [Passengers from Spawn Eggs](https://modrinth.com/datapack/passengers-from-spawn-eggs). Version 2.0 was created because the 1.0 version did not allow passengers to be spawned from spawn eggs by directly setting the NBT data ```Passengers```. I believe this did not completely solve the problem. Version 2.0 provides a perfect fix for this problem.│本資料包是參考[刷怪蛋裡的乘客](https://modrinth.com/datapack/passengers-from-spawn-eggs)的功能來製作的，之所以要製作2.0版本，是因為1.0版本並沒有辦法透過直接設定NBT資料```Passengers```來使刷怪蛋同時生成乘客，我認為沒有完全解決問題，2.0版本則對於該問題做出完美修復。
